data.body: BUG 2340 FIX complete + pushed as INDEPENDENT Gerrit change 751 (single commit on clean origin/main, NOT stacked on portability — honors user's independence constraint). Fix: eval_solver._criterion_id recovers project.<name> from plan-review-project-<name> (restore first dash->dot at namespace boundary); built-ins/unknowns unchanged. Self-contained regression test (tmp project.testcrit overlay) green; RED-first proven; lint/typecheck clean. Portability full-suite (b175a9m1w) GREEN: 6303 passed, only 3 machine-env config failures (CI clean env unaffected) — f698 DD-5 gate met. Now pushing f698 (stack 4th change) + running bug-fix full-suite as early-land regression check.
